question: Who was the head coach of the team that won the 2026 Stanley Cup?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The Carolina Hurricanes won the 2026 Stanley Cup (defeating the Vegas Golden Knights in six games), and their head coach was **Rod Brind'Amour**. Notably, this made him the fourth coach in NHL history to win a Stanley Cup as head coach after previously winning it with the same franchise as a player/captain — the first since Toe Blake in 1956.

Sources:
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Stanley_Cup_Final
- https://www.nhl.com/news/nhl-stanley-cup-champions-winners-complete-list-287705398
- https://www.wral.com/sports/hurricanes-win-stanley-cup-final-over-vegas-golden-knights-june-2026/

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: **Rod Brind’Amour** was the head coach of the Carolina Hurricanes, who won the 2026 Stanley Cup. [NHL.com](https://www.nhl.com/news/nhl-stanley-cup-champions-winners-complete-list-287705398)
